title: Build RankAI - AI Directory with Smart Search & Premium Minimal UI

requirements.text: Create Motoko backend with Tool type including id, name, slug, description, categories (array), pricing (Free/Freemium/Paid), website, rating, rankingScore, tags (array), bestFor (array), pros (array), cons (array), createdAt, updatedAt
acceptanceCriteria: Tool type defined in Motoko with all specified fields
Pricing is a variant type with Free, Freemium, and Paid options
Arrays properly typed for categories, tags, bestFor, pros, cons

requirements.text: Implement backend methods: addTool, getAllTools, getToolBySlug, getToolsByCategory, searchTools with keyword matching against tags, bestFor, and categories
acceptanceCriteria: addTool creates new tool with generated timestamp
getAllTools returns all tools sorted by rankingScore descending
getToolBySlug returns single tool or null
getToolsByCategory filters by category slug
searchTools matches keywords case-insensitively against tags, bestFor, and categories arrays

requirements.text: Seed backend with 8-10 example AI tools covering categories like image editing, content creation, coding assistance, productivity, with realistic data including ratings, tags, pros, cons, and bestFor descriptions
acceptanceCriteria: At least 8 tools seeded on initialization
Tools span multiple categories
Each tool has realistic ratings (4.0-5.0), tags, pros, cons, bestFor arrays
rankingScore calculated as (rating * 2) + initial popularity weight

requirements.text: Implement ranking algorithm where rankingScore = (rating * 2) + keywordMatches + popularityWeight, with search results sorted by rankingScore descending
acceptanceCriteria: Search method calculates keywordMatches by counting tag/bestFor/category matches
Final rankingScore computed using the formula
Results sorted highest to lowest rankingScore

requirements.text: Create homepage with hero section containing large heading 'Find the Best AI Tool for Any Task', subtitle, large search bar with placeholder 'What do you want to do?', popular categories grid, and trending AI tools section
acceptanceCriteria: Hero heading uses Instrument Serif font at large size
Search bar is prominent and functional
Categories displayed as grid cards
Trending tools section shows top-ranked tools

requirements.text: Create category page at route /category/:slug showing ranked tools with sorting options (Top Rated, Free, Most Popular), pricing filter, clean vertical card list, and ranking badges (1, 2, 3) for top tools
acceptanceCriteria: Dynamic route fetches tools by category slug
Sorting controls filter and reorder tools client-side
Pricing filter toggles Free/Freemium/Paid
Top 3 tools display visual ranking badges
Cards render in clean vertical list

requirements.text: Create tool detail page at route /tool/:slug displaying tool name, logo placeholder, description, tags, pricing type, pros list, cons list, Best For section, Visit Website button, and related tools section
acceptanceCriteria: Dynamic route fetches tool by slug
All tool details rendered clearly
Pros and cons displayed as separate lists
Visit Website button links to tool.website
Related tools section shows 3-4 tools from same category

requirements.text: Implement smart search functionality that matches user queries against tool tags, bestFor, and categories arrays, then sorts results by rankingScore descending
acceptanceCriteria: Search bar triggers backend searchTools query
Results display immediately as user types (debounced)
Example query 'remove background from image' returns relevant tools
Results sorted by ranking score

requirements.text: Apply premium minimal SaaS UI design inspired by tpot.cc with center-aligned layout, generous whitespace, soft borders (border-neutral-200/dark:border-neutral-800), rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl corners, clean minimal cards, smooth hover transitions, and no visual clutter
acceptanceCriteria: All cards use soft borders and rounded corners
Whitespace between elements is generous
Hover effects are subtle (scale, opacity)
No heavy shadows or gradients
Layout feels clean and uncluttered

requirements.text: Configure typography with Instrument Serif for hero headings only and Inter for all body text, with large elegant hero typography and normal letter spacing throughout
acceptanceCriteria: Instrument Serif loaded and applied to hero headings
Inter applied to all body text, buttons, labels
Hero heading is visually prominent with large size
Letter spacing is normal (not expanded)

requirements.text: Implement dark/light theme toggle in navbar with pure white background in light mode, soft neutral gray (NOT pitch black) in dark mode, and ensure proper contrast throughout
acceptanceCriteria: Theme toggle button in navbar switches between modes
Light mode uses white (#ffffff) background
Dark mode uses soft gray (e.g., #171717 or #1a1a1a), not black
All text maintains proper contrast in both modes
Theme preference persists across sessions

requirements.text: Create responsive mobile design with single column layout, sticky bottom search on mobile, collapsible filters, large tap targets, and no horizontal overflow
acceptanceCriteria: Below tablet breakpoint, layout switches to single column
Search bar sticks to bottom on mobile
Filter panels collapse into drawer or accordion
All interactive elements at least 44x44px
No content causes horizontal scroll

requirements.text: Build navbar with RankAI logo text, Categories link, Submit Tool placeholder link, theme toggle button, and responsive mobile menu
acceptanceCriteria: Logo displays 'RankAI' and links to homepage
Categories link navigates to category listing
Submit Tool link is present (can be placeholder)
Theme toggle visible and functional
Mobile menu collapses behind hamburger icon

requirements.text: Integrate Internet Identity authentication for admin route /admin with protected access and Add New Tool form
acceptanceCriteria: Admin route requires Internet Identity login
Unauthenticated users redirected or blocked
Add New Tool form includes all tool fields
Form submission calls backend addTool method
Success message shown after tool added

requirements.text: Add subtle animations including fade-in on page load, smooth hover scale on cards (200ms transition), and smooth transitions for theme toggle
acceptanceCriteria: Page content fades in on initial load
Cards scale slightly on hover with 200ms duration
Theme switch animates smoothly
All transitions feel polished, not jarring

constraints: Use only Motoko for backend (no Firebase or external databases)
Use only React + TypeScript + Vite for frontend (no Next.js)
Deploy on Internet Computer (no Vercel deployment)
Use Internet Identity for authentication (no Google OAuth or Firebase Auth)
Do not edit immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Server-side rendering or Next.js App Router
External API integrations for AI tools
Advanced admin dashboard beyond basic tool submission
